Sample Health Screening Report

Digitally Generated via hPod Kiosk

Patient Profile (Anonymized)

Gender: Male
Age: 21 Years
Height: 180.00 cm
Weight: 108.86 kg

Vitals & Heart Health

Blood Pressure: 133/89 mmHg (Clinical Screening Recommended)
Pulse: 85 bpm
SpO2 (Oxygen Levels): 96% (Normal)
Body Temperature: 97.57 °F (Normal)
ECG Heart Rate: 81 bpm

Body Composition Analysis

Total Body Weight: 108.86 kg
Intracellular Water: 27.20 L (Normal)
Extracellular Water: 20.51 L (High)
Waist Hip Ratio: 0.90 (Normal)
Skeletal Muscle Mass: 33.42 kg
Visceral Fat: 217 cm²
Basal Metabolic Rate: 1750 Cal

Target Goals & Insights

Metabolic Age: 44 Years
Ideal Body Weight: 73.00 kg
Weight to Lose: 36.00 kg

Note: Metabolic age is a measure of your body's functional age based on muscle mass, body fat, and BMR. Ideal body weight is calculated for optimal health based on height, age, and gender.

Health Advisory: Obesity and being overweight are linked with health concerns such as type 2 diabetes, kidney disease, high cholesterol, and hypertension. By gradually losing weight (0.5 to 1kg per week), you can significantly reduce your risk of developing these conditions.
Disclaimer: The IHL service provides helpful information about vitals for informational and educational purposes only. It is not intended to constitute professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Users assume full risk and responsibility for the use of information obtained through this service. Kiosk intended for individuals 18 years or older.
